use_cases: Creating scrollable containers with elegant fade-out edges at boundaries
Adding visual polish to content overflow areas in image galleries or carousels
Implementing progressive content reveal patterns in storytelling layouts
Building reading indicators with fade effects at scroll container edges
Enhancing card components with subtle scroll fade transitions
ai_summary: A lightweight React utility component that applies a CSS mask gradient to create smooth fade-out effects at the edges of scrollable containers. Supports both horizontal and vertical orientations, making it ideal for creating elegant content reveals, image carousels, and reading progress indicators in modern web interfaces.
